name: Pumpkin and Praline Pie
recipeIngredient: Hot water pie dough; see recipe
recipeInstructions:
Filling: Mix sugars, flour, bitters, spices in large bowl. Stir in egg; set aside. Melt butter in large skillet over low heat.
Add pumpkin; simmer, stirring occasionally until puree thickens slightly, 10 minutes. Gradually stir hot pumpkin into sugar mixture; stir in evaporated milk, milk, and water. If desired, cover and refrigerate overnight.
Praline: Prepare Hot Water Crusts. Preheat oven to 450°F. Spread half the praline mix in each crust. Bake until praline is golden brown and bubbly, 10 minutes; cool slightly. Reduce oven temperature to 400°F. Pour half pumpkin filling into each crust; smooth top with spatula. Bake until pumpkin is firm and crusts are golden brown, 1 hour. Cool completely and serve. Garnish with whipped cream or topping if desired.
